description:
You are a seismic risk analyst at a global reinsurance company. Generate a country-level portfolio exposure report based on the past 30 days of seismic activity. Using the USGS earthquake feed (/home/ga/GIS_Data/earthquakes_month.geojson) and Natural Earth country boundaries (/home/ga/GIS_Data/world_countries.geojson), export a GeoJSON FeatureCollection to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/country_seismic_exposure.geojson.

The output must include only countries that experienced at least one earthquake epicenter within their boundary. Each feature must retain the original country geometry and fields (including 'ADMIN' and 'ISO_A3'), plus these computed fields:
- quake_count: integer count of earthquake epicenters within the country boundary
- mean
